text.title: Lessons Learned Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the lessons-learned methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and a decision-gate that maps to a rule.

step.name: mandatory_retrieval
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Project planning must retrieve relevant lessons before estimation; un-retrieved lessons are not lessons.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `mandatory-retrieval` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: reusable_not_narrative
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Lesson must be reusable across projects (general pattern + recommendation), not project-specific narrative.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `reusable-not-narrative` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: category_required
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Each lesson must be tagged with one category from the taxonomy (process, technical, vendor, comms, risk).
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `category-required` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: source_cited
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Each lesson must cite its source project + retro/closure event.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `source-cited` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: review_cadence
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Lesson repository must be reviewed quarterly for relevance; stale lessons archived.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `review-cadence` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: validate_and_record
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-lessons-learned.py --file artefact.json`. Record output under `## Status` in the artefact.
step.output: Exit 0 = artefact accepted; exit 1 = violations listed; exit 2 = usage error.
step.decision-gate: Validator MUST return 0 before downstream consumption.
